_note: R173 Phase B — 발견된 명백한 데이터 오류 정정 (R173 검증 과정에서 handbook 과 비교 결과). build-materials.mjs 의 후처리에서 entry 이름 정확 매칭 시 ranges 의 typical/min/max 를 overrides 의 값으로 교체. 출처 = ASM Handbook + MMPDS-08.

overrides.name: ZE63A — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R221b — CSV(M_000041~60)가 ZE63A As-Cast/Annealed/T1~T10 등 21개 가짜 HT variant를 합성 inflated UTS(369~447)·낮은 thermal_k(50)·낮은 El(~4.5)로 등록. 대표 entry가 T1 variant(UTS 393.6)를 들고 있어 신규 verified AZoM source(UTS 300)와 모순. 실제 ZE63A-T6: σy~190 / UTS~300 / El~10% / k~109 W/m·K / ρ1.87 (AZoM UNS M16630 + ASM Vol.2)로 정정.

overrides.name: AA 7075 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AA 7075-O temper σy 105 MPa / UTS 230 MPa / El 17%. 이전 값 σy 473 은 T6 (peak aged) condition mock — Annealed entry 라면 O temper 값이어야 함. (Aluminum Association 7075 datasheet)

overrides.name: AA 2024 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AA 2024-O temper σy 75 MPa / UTS 185 MPa / El 20%. 이전 값 σy 305 은 T3 condition mock. (MMPDS-08 Vol.1 Sec.3.7)

overrides.name: AA 5083 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AA 5083-O temper σy 145 / UTS 290 / El 22%. 이전 값 σy 214 은 H321 mock. (ASM Vol.2)

overrides.name: AISI 4340 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AISI 4340 annealed σy 470 / UTS 745 / El 22%. 이전 값 σy 968 / UTS 1408 은 Q+T condition mock. (MMPDS-08 + AMS 6415)

overrides.name: AA 5052 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AA 5052-O temper σy 90 / UTS 195 / El 25%. 이전 값 σy 181 은 H32 mock (R5xxx non-heat-treatable, only O & Hxx tempers exist).

overrides.name: AA 6061 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook AA 6061-O temper σy 55 / UTS 124 / El 25%. 이전 값 σy 259 은 T6 mock — heat-treatable 의 잘못된 condition mapping. (MMPDS-08 Sec.3.6)

overrides._alloy_group_note: Tmax (max_service_temp) 정정 — CSV 의 잘못된 값.
overrides.name: PA12 EOS PA 2200 — SLS Standard
overrides.reason: R173 — EOS PA 2200 (Nylon 12) max continuous service temp 80°C (HDT 0.46 MPa 145°C, 1.8 MPa 75°C). 이전 Tmax 540 은 분명 오류 — Tg = 50°C, Tm = 178°C 인 polymer 가 540°C 사용 불가.

overrides.name: ULTEM 1010 (PEI)
overrides.reason: R173 — SABIC ULTEM 1010 (PEI homopolymer) HDT 213°C, max continuous 200°C. 이전 Tmax 540 은 처리 melting T (~370°C) 도 넘는 명백한 오류.

overrides.name: ULTEM 1010 — Industrial Grade
overrides.reason: R173 — 위와 동일 (ULTEM 1010 PEI homopolymer industrial grade).

overrides.name: AISI 1050 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — AISI 1050 medium-C steel max service ≈ 425°C (other 10xx entries 도 540 인 점 — 1050 의 200 은 데이터 입력 오류).

overrides.name: AISI 1050 — As-cast / forged (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — 위와 동일.

overrides.name: AISI 1050 — Strain-hardened (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — 위와 동일.

overrides.name: AISI 1050 — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — 위와 동일.

overrides.name: AISI 1050 — Quenched / tempered (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — 위와 동일.

overrides.name: SUP9 (JIS Cr-Mn spring steel) — Q+T (430°C, spring temper)
overrides.reason: R173 — JIS spring steel SUP9 Q+T 430°C 기준 max service ≈ 480°C (over-tempering 위쪽). 이전 Tmax 815 은 austenitic stainless level — 오류. (JIS G4801)

overrides.name: SUP10 (JIS Cr-V spring steel) — Q+T (430°C)
overrides.reason: R173 — JIS spring steel SUP10 동일 (Tmax 480°C).

overrides.name: STAVAX ESR (Uddeholm, ≈ AISI 420 mod) — corrosion-resistant mold — Soft Annealed (delivery)
overrides.reason: R173 — Uddeholm Stavax (1.2083 mod) max use 540°C (over-tempering 위쪽). 이전 Tmax 650 은 austenitic stainless level — mold steel 에서는 over-aging. (Uddeholm datasheet)

overrides.name: ZTA (Zirconia-Toughened Alumina, 10-20% ZrO₂)
overrides.reason: R173 — ZTA continuous max ≈ 1500°C (alumina 의 max 와 zirconia over-aging 의 균형). 이전 Tmax 540 은 잘못 — ceramic 의 540 max 는 polymer 수준. (CoorsTek + Kyocera)

overrides.name: Maraging C300 (18Ni-300) — Wrought, Aged
overrides.reason: R173 — Maraging steel max use ≈ 480°C (over-aging 위쪽). 이전 Tmax 200 은 polymer 수준 — 오류.

overrides.name: Maraging C350 (VascoMax, 18Ni-9Co) — Solution annealed 815°C AC (soft 30-35 HRC, formable)
overrides.reason: R173 — VascoMax C-350 동일 (max 480°C).

overrides.name: Maraging C350 (VascoMax, 18Ni-9Co) — Aged 480-510°C / 3-6h AC (peak, HRC 53-55)
overrides.reason: R173 — VascoMax C-350 peak aged 동일 (max 480°C).

overrides.name: STS304 ULC (Ultra-Low-Carbon austenitic stainless, C ≤ 0.015) — Annealed (1050°C WQ) + ULC refining
overrides.reason: R173 — STS304 ULC (KS D 3705) max service 870°C (austenitic stainless 표준). 이전 Tmax 200 은 명백한 오류.

overrides.name: STS304L (KS D 3705 / JIS G 4304, low-carbon austenitic stainless) — Annealed (1050°C WQ)
overrides.reason: R173 — STS304L 동일 (max 870°C, AISI 304L 의 KR 표준).

overrides.name: STS316L (KS D 3705 / JIS G 4304, low-carbon Mo-bearing austenitic stainless) — Annealed (1050°C WQ)
overrides.reason: R173 — STS316L 동일 (max 870°C, AISI 316L 의 KR 표준).

overrides.name: SCM430 (JIS Cr-Mo, AISI 4130 equiv.) — Annealed
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook 4130 annealed σy 360 / UTS 560. 이전 460/690 은 Normalized condition mock. (ASM Vol.1)

overrides.name: SNCM439 (JIS Ni-Cr-Mo, AISI 4340 equiv.) — Annealed
overrides.reason: R173 — handbook 4340 annealed σy 470 / UTS 745. 이전 540/780 은 Normalized condition mock.

overrides.name: PEKK
overrides.reason: R173 — PEKK max use 250-260°C continuous (Tg 162°C, Tm 305-360°C). 이전 Tmax 90 은 명백한 오류 — PEEK 와 동등 high-T polymer.

overrides.name: PEKK-CF (carbon fiber)
overrides.reason: R173 — PEKK-CF 동일 (max 250°C). CF 보강만 추가, polymer matrix Tmax 변화 없음.

overrides.name: LDPE — As-supplied (Injection Molding)
overrides.reason: R173 — LDPE Tm 105-115°C, HDT (0.46 MPa) 49°C, max continuous service 60-70°C. 이전 Tmax 90 은 HDPE 수준 — LDPE 는 더 낮음.

overrides.name: Silicone Rubber — As-supplied (Injection Molding)
overrides.reason: R173 — Silicone Rubber (VMQ) max continuous 200-250°C, short-term 300°C (heat-resistant grade). 이전 Tmax 90 은 elastomer 평균 — Si 는 thermal class 가장 우수 (heat-resistant elastomer 표준).

overrides.name: Super 304H (S30432, Nb-Cu strengthened 18Cr-9Ni) — Solution Annealed (1100°C WQ)
overrides.reason: R173 — Super 304H (S30432) 는 ultra-supercritical (USC) boiler tube 용 austenitic. Nb-Cu 석출경화 → creep rupture σf 100,000h @ 700°C ≈ 100 MPa. 이전 Tmax 200 은 잘못 — 실제 750-870°C continuous (creep-controlled).

overrides.name: AA 6151 — Strain-hardened (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — AA 6151 (Al-Mg-Si-Cr forging) max use 170°C (6xxx family 표준). 이전 Tmax undefined — handbook 값 보강.

overrides.name: AISI H21 (Hot-Work Tungsten tool) — Annealed
overrides.reason: R173 — AISI H21 (W-Cr hot-work tool steel) max use 600°C (red-hardness limit, secondary hardening). 이전 Tmax 1700 은 Tm 가까운 값 — 명백한 오류 (tool steel 의 일반 max 540-600°C).

overrides.name: PPS GF40 — As-supplied (Injection Molding)
overrides.reason: R173 — PPS GF40 (Celanese Fortron 1140L4, Solvay Ryton R-4) HDT (1.8 MPa) 270°C, max use 220-240°C continuous. 이전 Tmax 100 은 polypropylene 수준 — PPS 는 high-T engineering polymer.

overrides.name: Inconel 100 — Aged / solution-treated (Cast)
overrides.reason: R173 — IN-100 (cast γ' Ni superalloy) max use 980°C continuous (1100°C short). 이전 Tmax 400 은 polymer 수준 — Ni superalloy 의 명백한 오류 (jet engine turbine blade legacy material).

overrides.name: Incoloy 909
overrides.reason: R173 — Incoloy 909 (controlled-expansion Fe-Ni-Co, UNS N19909) max use 540°C continuous (Curie 425°C 위에서 CTE 증가). 이전 Tmax 1100 은 Inconel superalloy 와 혼동 — 909 는 Invar-class low-CTE alloy.

overrides.name: Be-Cu — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — BeCu (C17200, CuBe2) Young's modulus 128 GPa (Materion datasheet). 이전 E 310 은 pure Beryllium (Be) 의 modulus 와 혼동된 오류 — Cu 가 약 98% mass 이므로 modulus 는 Cu base (110-130 GPa).

overrides.name: Mo-La (Lanthanum-doped Mo, MoLa) — Annealed (1100°C)
overrides.reason: R173 — Mo-La (Plansee MoLa, 0.7% La₂O₃) max use 1900°C continuous (high-T furnace heating element). 이전 Tmax 200 은 polymer 수준 — 명백한 오류 (Plansee datasheet: Mo-La > MoLa > pure Mo for high-T applications).

overrides.name: Zirconium — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — Zirconium (UNS R60001 unalloyed) max continuous use 400°C in air (above which rapid oxidation). 이전 Tmax 170 은 Al 수준 — 잘못 (handbook ATI Wah Chang Zr datasheet).

overrides.name: Chromium (pure)
overrides.reason: R173 — Pure Cr (Tm 1907°C, ρ 7.19) max continuous use 950°C in air (above → rapid oxidation Cr₂O₃ spall). DBTT 300°C — RT brittle (cast/forged). ASM Vol.2 Refractory Metals.

overrides.name: Hafnium
overrides.reason: R173 — Pure Hf (Tm 2233°C, ρ 13.31) max continuous use 800°C (HfO₂ surface oxidation 보호적이지만 thicker layer 형성). ATI Wah Chang Hafnium datasheet.

overrides.name: Vanadium — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — Pure V (Tm 1910°C) max continuous use 600°C in air (above → rapid oxidation V₂O₅ — Tm 690°C, vapor). Fusion reactor first-wall material (V-Cr-Ti).

overrides.name: Zircaloy-2 — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — Zircaloy-2 (BWR cladding) max continuous use 400°C (reactor coolant 300°C standard; accident 1200°C+ short-term — steam-Zr reaction). ATI Wah Chang.

overrides.name: Zirconium 705
overrides.reason: R173 — Zirconium 705 (Zr-2.5Nb, UNS R60705) max continuous use 450°C in air (chemical process — strong acid HNO₃/H₂SO₄/HCl). ASTM B493.

overrides.name: PA46
overrides.reason: R173 — PA46 (DSM Stanyl, Polytetramethylene adipamide) — high-temp nylon. Tg 78°C, Tm 295°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) 160°C unfilled / 290°C GF30, max service 170°C continuous. 이전 Tmax 110 은 일반 PA66 수준 — PA46 는 PA family 중 가장 high-T.

overrides.name: PBI (Celazole)
overrides.reason: R173 — PBI (Polybenzimidazole, Celazole Performance Plastics) — **가장 high-T thermoplastic**. Tg 427°C, no Tm (amorphous), max service 300°C continuous / 500°C short. 이전 Tmax 90 은 PP 수준 — 명백한 오류 (PBI 는 PEEK 의 2× 한계).

overrides.name: PFA
overrides.reason: R173 — PFA (Perfluoroalkoxy, Chemours Teflon PFA) — fluoropolymer family. Tg ≈ -10°C, Tm 305°C, max service 260°C continuous (PTFE 와 동등). 이전 Tmax 90 은 PE 수준 — fluoropolymer 의 명백한 오류 (FDA + 화학 plant 표준 lining).

overrides.name: PCTFE
overrides.reason: R173 — PCTFE (Polychlorotrifluoroethylene, 3M Kel-F 81 / Daikin Neoflon) — fluoropolymer. Tg 80°C, Tm 215°C, max service 175°C continuous (영하 -240°C 까지 ductile — cryogenic O₂ valve seat). 이전 Tmax 90 은 generic polymer 수준 — fluoropolymer 의 잘못.

overrides.name: Rohacell A PMI structural foam (Evonik aircraft grade) — Rohacell 31A (density 32 kg/m³, σc 0.4 MPa, σt 1.0 MPa)
overrides.reason: R173 — Rohacell A (Evonik PMI foam) max continuous service 180°C (autoclave-compatible aerospace sandwich panel core). 이전 Tmax 90 은 일반 polymer foam 수준 — Rohacell 의 핵심 장점은 high-T 사용 가능 (PEI/PEEK skin 함께 autoclave cure).

overrides.name: Tungsten Heavy Alloy — As-supplied (Sintered)
overrides.reason: R173 — Tungsten Heavy Alloy (W-Ni-Fe / W-Ni-Cu, 90-97% W liquid-phase sintered) max use 600°C continuous (Ni-Fe matrix limits — above which W₃Fe₃C 부착 + oxidation). 이전 Tmax 1700 은 pure W 수준 — sintered W heavy alloy 는 matrix limited. Plansee Densimet datasheet.

overrides.name: Hastelloy B-2
overrides.reason: R173 — Hastelloy B-2 (UNS N10665, Ni-28Mo) max continuous use 760°C (sigma + Ni-Mo intermetallic 형성 540°C 위에서 → 540-760°C 는 pressure-vessel sour service caution zone). 이전 Tmax 540 은 lower bound — 일반 service spec 까지 760°C.

overrides.name: CFRP — M40J/Cyanate Ester (UD 0°, satellite dimensional)
overrides.reason: R173 — Cyanate Ester matrix (Bryte 5250-4, Lonza Primaset PT-30) Tg 280-300°C, max use 350°C continuous. 이전 Tmax 540 은 Pitch CFRP matrix-free 수준 — Cyanate ester matrix 가 limits.

overrides.name: Beryllium — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — Beryllium (Brush S-200F, vacuum hot-pressed) max use 700°C continuous (above → BeO surface oxide growth). Materion datasheet. ⚠ Be dust + machining swarf NIOSH 1A carcinogen — HEPA/ULPA 시 가공만 가능.

overrides.name: Tungsten Carbide (WC-Co, 6%)
overrides.reason: R173 — WC-Co 6% cutting tool service limit ≈ 800°C (Co 1495°C melt, but practical limit by Co matrix softening + cobalt oxidation + WC binder degradation). 이전 Tmax 1700 은 WC pure Tm (2870°C) 와 혼동 — sintered WC-Co 의 실제 service max ≈ 800-900°C (Sandvik/Kennametal datasheet).

overrides.name: Tungsten Carbide (WC-Co, 12%)
overrides.reason: R173 — WC-Co 12% — higher Co → tougher but lower thermal limit (Co matrix softens earlier). Service max ≈ 750°C (handbook Kennametal/Sandvik).

overrides.name: AA 6151 — Aged / solution-treated (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — AA 6151 6xxx family max use 170°C (T6 condition).

overrides.name: Be-Cu — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — BeCu C17200 max use 200°C continuous (Materion datasheet — above which over-aging).

overrides.name: Zamak 3 (Zinc)
overrides.reason: R173 — Zamak 3 (ZnAl4) — Zn die-cast max continuous 95°C (Zn creep — above which dimensional change). ASTM B86.

overrides.name: Commercial Bronze C22000
overrides.reason: R173 — Commercial Bronze (90Cu-10Zn) max use 200°C — brass family standard (above → dezincification + creep).

overrides.name: C21000 (Red Brass 95Cu-5Zn, Gilding Metal) — O (Annealed)
overrides.reason: R173 — Red Brass family Tmax 200°C (CDA datasheet).

overrides.name: C21000 (Red Brass 95Cu-5Zn, Gilding Metal) — H (Full-Hard)
overrides.reason: R173 — Full-hard CW reduce Tmax slightly (recrystallization 위쪽).

overrides.name: C22000 (Red Brass 90Cu-10Zn, Commercial Bronze) — O (Annealed)
overrides.reason: R173 — Red Brass family Tmax 200°C.

overrides.name: C22000 (Red Brass 90Cu-10Zn, Commercial Bronze) — H (Full-Hard)
overrides.reason: R173 — Full-hard CW reduce Tmax.

overrides.name: C23000 (Red Brass 85Cu-15Zn) — O (Annealed)
overrides.reason: R173 — Red Brass family Tmax 200°C.

overrides.name: C23000 (Red Brass 85Cu-15Zn) — H (Full-Hard)
overrides.reason: R173 — Full-hard CW reduce Tmax.

overrides.name: Mo-0.5Ti — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — Mo-0.5Ti (TZM Mo-0.5Ti-0.08Zr base) max use 1700°C inert / 1100°C in air (oxidation). Plansee.

overrides.name: Mo-La (Lanthanum-doped Mo, MoLa) — Stress-relieved (recrystallization-resistant)
overrides.reason: R173 — Mo-La stress-relieved 동일 (max 1900°C inert atmosphere).

overrides.name: Zircaloy-4 (R60804) — PWR fuel cladding — Stress-Relieved Annealed (SRA, ~480°C, cold-worked + SR)
overrides.reason: R173 — Zircaloy-4 PWR cladding service temp 300-350°C coolant + max 400°C limit (above → rapid waterside oxidation).

overrides.name: Zircaloy-4 (R60804) — PWR fuel cladding — Recrystallized Annealed (RXA, ~565°C, mill annealed)
overrides.reason: R173 — RXA 동일 (max 400°C in coolant).

overrides.name: Zircaloy-4 (R60804) — PWR fuel cladding — Partial RXA
overrides.reason: R173 — Partial RXA 동일.

overrides.name: AISI 4340 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — AISI 4340 (UNS G43400) handbook composition (Ni-Cr-Mo). 이전 Al 97.5% 은 AA 6061 의 composition 과 혼동 — 명백한 데이터 오류 (Al-base alloy vs Fe-base alloy steel).

overrides.name: AISI 4130 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.reason: R173 — AISI 4130 (UNS G41300) handbook composition (Cr-Mo). 이전 Al 97.5% 은 AISI 4340 와 동일 mock 오류 — Fe-base 정정 (ASTM A29 / AMS 6345).

overrides.name: Stainless Steel 316L — Annealed (1050°C WQ)
overrides.reason: R173 — 316L (austenitic stainless) max use 870°C continuous. 이전 Tmax 200 은 명백한 오류 (다른 316L entries 도 모두 870°C — 이 entry 만 단독 200). NOTE: range override 가 name override 보다 먼저 실행 — pre-rename name 사용.

overrides.name: Ti-6Al-7Nb
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: modulus=105 (annealed bar 20°C, ASTM F1295 (ACNIS FT009) — DB 110 was a Ti-6Al-4V carry-over; Nb 치환으로 E↓)

overrides.name: A380 (die-cast Al)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: density=2.76 (A380 (A03800) as-cast die-cast 표준값 (ASM/MatWeb))

overrides.name: 416 stainless
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: density=7.8 (S41600 RT bulk density (AZoM/ASM handbook))

overrides.name: Rene N5
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: density=8.7 (cast single-crystal RT 대표값 (Neway 8.73 / density paper ~8.70)) · elongation=10 (cast single-crystal RT (Neway 8–10%) — DB 16%는 RT cast-SX 상한 초과)

overrides.name: 15-7 PH
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=1448 (TH1050 sheet/strip RT (AK Steel PH 15-7 Mo, AMS 5520 typ))

overrides.name: Ti Grade 11
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: thermal_conductivity=20.6 (RT annealed (AZoM/ASM, CP-Ti Gr1 analog))

overrides.name: PS — As-supplied (Injection Molding)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=42 (GPPS injection-moulded ~23°C (AZoM 798, 30–45 MPa대 중앙)) · glass_transition_temp=100 (atactic GPPS Tg (AZoM 798: 370–380 K = 97–107°C) — DB 80은 폴리머 기본값 오류)

overrides.name: PVC (rigid)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: elongation=60 (연질 아닌 rigid UPVC 파단신율 typical (AZoM 770))

overrides.name: PAI (Torlon)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=138 (Torlon 4203 unfilled 23°C, ASTM D638 (Ensinger/Solvay)) · elongation=10 (Torlon 4203 unfilled 23°C 파단신율 (Ensinger/Solvay))

overrides.name: Polyimide (Vespel)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: elongation=7.5 (Vespel SP-1 23°C strain at break (DuPont VPE-A10861))

overrides.name: LCP
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=148 (unfilled LCP Vectra A950 ISO527 23°C (stress at break)) · elongation=5.7 (unfilled LCP Vectra A950 ISO527 23°C) · modulus=7.8 (unfilled LCP Vectra A950 ISO527 23°C — DB 11은 filled grade값)

overrides.name: PHA (bioplastic)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=30 (representative PHA/PHB ISO527 (colorFabb allPHA 26; family typ)) · modulus=2.5 (representative PHA ISO527 (colorFabb allPHA 2.51 GPa))

overrides.name: Natural Composite — Bamboo (split)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: density=0.66 (dry culm wall ISO22157:2019 (Guadua, PMC10751844))

overrides.name: Natural Composite — Balsa (parallel to grain)
overrides.reason: R221c — basis-locked 값 정정: uts=14.4 (parallel-to-grain ASTM C297, end-grain balsa ~152 kg/m³ (CoreLite BALSASUD Std))
